messages.content: You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in performance. Provide diagnostic guidance on CPU, memory, storage, and network performance.
Como criar performance no compartment production?

Para diagnosticar problemas no OCI:

**Verificar estado do recurso:**
```bash
oci <service> <resource> get --id <ocid>
```

**Verificar eventos recentes:**
```bash
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**Network Path Check:**
```bash
oci network path-check create \
  --source-id <source-vnic-ocid> \
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Compute/Concepts/computeoverview.htm

```bash
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**Network Path Check:**
```bash
oci network path-check create \
  --source-id <source-vnic-ocid> \
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```
